findings.description: s1 shows all SQL file examples including GET_LIST2 ($if) and GET_LIST4 ($sort) in full, but neither `$if` nor `$sort` appear in s1's hints. Users searching for these SQL constructs via hints would only reach s4/s6, missing the complete SQL file definitions in s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source GET_LIST2 SQL uses `$if (loginId) {...}` etc.; GET_LIST4 uses `$sort(sortId) {...}`; both are in the SQL block that s1 covers.

findings.description: `Map` or `Mapインタフェース` is absent from s5's hints, despite the section containing an explicit warning that Map interface implementations cannot be used as condition objects for dynamic IN clause generation.
findings.source_evidence: Source warning: 「IN句を動的に生成する場合、条件オブジェクトにはMapインタフェースの実装クラスを指定することは出来ないので注意すること。」
